# virtualbox_vm (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    virtualbox = {
      source = "registry.terraform.io/namnd/virtualbox"
    }
  }
}

provider "virtualbox" {
  # example configuration here
}

variable "name" {
  type    = string
  default = "test-vm-creation"
}

resource "virtualbox_vm" "vm" {
  name = var.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the virtual machine.

### Optional

- `os_type` (String) VirtualBox guest OS type identifier (for example, `Linux_64`).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `last_updated` (String)
